answers.where: I am back on the Frost Keep path after an Avalanche Reset, with Frost Shards converted into Frost Blueprints on the right side.
answers.action: Spend Frost Shards on a Blueprint, then fight for Blocks and rebuild the Keep again.
answers.response: Clicking Sharper Steel spends one Shard, raises the Blueprint level, and permanently increases hero damage.
answers.reward: The next expedition starts stronger because Frost Shards became a permanent damage bonus.
answers.game_look: The screen shows combat, a rebuilt Keep target, a dominant rebuild CTA, and a readable meta-upgrade panel rather than loose debug text.

next: Redesign offline return around Frost Shards and add stronger reset/blueprint feedback audio or animation.
